creator: marko@iprg.nokia.com
text:
Currently driver parses SIA info leaf from SROM wrong. It goes off-by-one
when reading register values.

Fix: 

Fix offset when reading register values from SROM contents into tulip_medium_t.
How-To-Repeat: 
Get a tulip card that has SIA fields, like znyx zx345 or zx346. And compare
SROM dump with parsed values. Or read through digital's SROM documentation
and then read the code.
